arts.ttl: Manchester City 'plot STUNNING move for Paul Pogba' as Pep Guardiola searches for midfield reinforcements... but Premier League champions face one key stumbling block to secure the former United star's services
arts.sum: Manchester City have identified Paul Pogba as a potential midfield addition amidst the club's dismal run of form but could be prevented by the player having a key issue over a move to the Etihad.

arts.ttl: Manchester City duo 'in serious danger of being offloaded' amid Premier League struggles
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly mulling over whether to part ways with midfielders Matheus Nunes and Kalvin Phillips during the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Man City players at risk of suspension: Defensive problems threaten to pile for Pep Guardiola
arts.sum: City boss does not need more absences during dire run of form

arts.ttl: Former Man City player named president of Georgia
arts.sum: After 17 days of pro-EU protests, a former Manchester City footballer is appointed president.

arts.ttl: Man Utd legend gives verdict on Ruben Amorim - "I’ve experienced that with Sir Alex"
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has been tasked with transforming Manchester United's fortunes - and Wes Brown has already been impressed by what he's seen of the new man in the hotseat

arts.ttl: Man City 'sound out Paul Pogba' as private Man Utd thoughts impact blockbuster transfer
arts.sum: Manchester City have endured a rotten season this term and boss Pep Guardiola could potentially be forced into evasive action with a move for former Manchester United misfit Paul Pogba

arts.ttl: Man City legend claims silverware hopes hinge on two key players
arts.sum: Manchester City are on a nightmare run of form, but Blues legend Richard Dunne believes Pep Guardiola's men can still have a successful season

arts.ttl: What Man United boss Ruben Amorim did before Man City clash speaks volumes
arts.sum: Manchester United take on Manchester City on Sunday but Ruben Amorim found the time to observe an academy game

arts.ttl: Man City considering move for Paul Pogba but face key stumbling block
arts.sum: Pogba is set to return to fooball in March after the conclusion of his doping ban

arts.ttl: Man City eye Newcastle star as UNPRECIDENTED €180m January move looms
arts.sum: “Sources have told ESPN that Manchester City will go for Martin Zubimendi and Bruno Guimaraes in the January transfer market in order to rescue their season,” the report indicates . Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola is ready to spend big in the January transfer window after a catastrophic run of form that threatens to derail the club’s season.
